_comment: Reusable component code (HTML/CSS/JS) the agent pulls and re-skins via frame.md. Heavy source lives in this repo; this is the index. Add one entry per component you promote. Format matches the skill's references/library/components.manifest.json.

components.name: Metric card (2x2 / 2x3 grid)
components.notes: Staggered pop-in + count-up; coral accent on the hero number. Numeric values count up, placeholders like [din siffra] stay static. 4 values = 2x2, 5-6 = 2x3. Never fabricate the number.

components.name: Claude Code prompt box
components.notes: Dark prompt box with a deterministic, frame-seekable typing animation, coral caret/cursor/send pill. Re-skin per video with frame.md.

components.name: Light-flare transition
components.notes: The signature transition. Soft warm sweep; the incoming shot is revealed at the flare's peak. Sync the peak to an SFX swoosh. 3-6 per short.
